backend/main.mo: Motoko backend actor that manages gym services (CRUD operations) and returns static business information for Bodyshape Fitness in Dallas, TX, including blob storage mixin integration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two homepage changes: removing the Operations Manager bio section and creating a new gym-focused facilities section with photo and description.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the Bodyshape Fitness website structure, components, pages, and styling with Kentucky location details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color system with true red accent colors (hue 25-30) for light and dark modes, plus base styling for the fitness brand theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags and title for Bodyshape Fitness personal training in Dallas, TX.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for Home and Locations pages wrapped in a Layout component.
Audio player component with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that persists preferences to localStorage and plays royalty-free workout music from Bensound.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Interactive gallery component displaying 12 gym facility photos in a responsive grid with hover effects and modal dialog for enlarged image viewing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with Bodyshape Fitness branding, responsive navigation with mobile menu, BackgroundMusic integration, and footer showing Kentucky location details with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LocationCard.tsx: React component that displays a location card with name, address, phone, and hours using icons from lucide-react and a Card UI component.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: React component that renders a grid of customer testimonials with star ratings, review text, reviewer names, and dates from imported review data.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: TypeScript data file exporting a Review interface and an array of 6 customer reviews with 5-star ratings for Bodyshape Fitness gym.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor for backend communication, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend; currently exports nothing as no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, Google Fonts imports (Inter and Bebas Neue), and a bold red fitness brand color scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero section with 20th anniversary badge, gym description with owner photo, and testimonials section for Bodyshape Fitness gym.
frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx: Locations page component displaying gym location details with LocationCard, embedded Google Maps iframe, and contact information including phone, email, and address.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file that defines custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, typography settings with Inter and Bebas Neue fonts, container queries, animations for accordions, and includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking development of a Bodyshape Fitness gym website in Independence, Kentucky, documenting architectural notes, known issues (incorrect content, wrong location, pink instead of red colors), existing features (homepage, gallery, locations page), and requirements for extracting real content from Facebook/Yelp instead of using placeholders.
